_comment: Authoritative source for the dealer onboarding form. The manager app renders the web form from sections[] and transforms submissions into spoke.config.json via each field's `maps` path. Every spoke.schema.json property has exactly one field here (except derived ones: dealer.id, hub.*, which the server fills in at approve time).

sections.title: Existing website
sections.description: If you already have a website, paste it here. We'll read it automatically to pre-fill your contact info, services, hours, product prices, and social links — so you don't have to retype them.

fields.label: Your existing website URL
fields.help: Optional. If provided, we'll ingest content from this site on approval.

sections.title: Business
sections.description: Who you are and how customers reach you.

fields.label: State
fields.help: Two-letter state code.

fields.label: Service area
fields.help: States, regions, or "nationwide".

fields.label: Other drone brands you also carry
fields.help: Acknowledged but not featured on your dealer site.

sections.title: Brand & visual direction
sections.description: How your site should look and feel.

fields.label: Design archetype
fields.help: How the site is themed. Each dealer in the network gets a unique archetype + accent combo. Your choice is still accepted if taken; we'll discuss at review.

options.label: FORGE — dark, dramatic, glowing ember aesthetic
FIELD — warm earth tones, agricultural photography
Gradient — primary to secondary (e.g. orange → red)

fields.label: Primary accent color
fields.help: Six-digit hex code.

fields.label: Secondary accent color
fields.help: Required if mode is Gradient or Dual.

fields.label: Font preference
fields.placeholder: Montserrat (or leave blank for system stack)
fields.help: Leave blank for the default Tailwind system stack. Otherwise name a Google Font.

sections.title: Voice
sections.description: Your hero headline — the one thing every visitor sees first.

fields.label: Hero headline
fields.placeholder: No Shortcuts. Honest Answers. Built On Trust.
fields.help: Short, memorable. Periods separate lines when rendered.

fields.label: Tagline (optional)
fields.placeholder: American-designed precision agriculture, shipped in 45 days.
fields.help: Only if you have a distinct two-line treatment.

sections.title: Logo
sections.description: Either upload an image, paste a URL, or give us wordmark text.

fields.label: Logo image URL or uploaded path
fields.help: Required if logo type is Image.

fields.label: Wordmark text
fields.help: Required if logo type is Wordmark.

sections.title: Contact form
sections.description: Every contact form has Name, Email, Phone, and Message. Add extras if they help you qualify leads.

fields.label: Include base fields (Name / Email / Phone / Message)
Optional extra fields

options.label: Interest dropdown ("I'm interested in Drones / Service / Parts / Training")

fields.help: Pick whatever fits your sales process. Most dealers use base only.

sections.title: Story
sections.description: A few facts so the site can speak for your business authentically.

fields.label: Year founded
fields.help: 4-digit year (string, e.g. '2021').

fields.label: Notable facts (pick any)
fields.help: Choose any that apply. You can also add more below.

fields.label: Other notable facts (one per line)
fields.placeholder:
50,000+ acres of application experience
Christian-faith-grounded — motto "Never tire of doing what is good"
fields.help: One fact per line. These combine with your selected facts above.

fields.label: Owner bio (optional)
fields.placeholder: 2-3 paragraphs, used on your About section.
fields.help: Optional. If you have an existing website, we'll pull verbatim voice samples from your About page automatically.

sections.title: Social media
sections.description: Optional. Only fill the ones you actually use.

sections.title: Quirks + special requests
sections.description: Short bullets — anything non-obvious we should know before building.

fields.label: Things you insist on or have rejected before
fields.placeholder:
Don't use the word "crop dusting" — we hate it.
Don't show DJI Agras T100 by model name, just a generic mention.
Always include both Tom's and James's phone numbers.
fields.help: One item per line.

fields.label: Integrations or features you want
fields.placeholder:
Call scheduling in the contact form
Google Reviews live feed
Instagram grid embed
fields.help: One per line. Some may be future-feature asks; we'll flag anything static HTML can't do.

fields.label: Reference / inspiration sites (one URL per line)
fields.help: Sites you like the look of.

normalizations._description: Directional map from common variant service names to canonical values in sections[].fields where id is 'services'. Use ONLY for unambiguous wording-level variants. Kept from prior hub version for service normalization during ingest.
